visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens with a close-up of a young woman with dark hair wearing a light blue button-down shirt over a white top. She is taking a large bite of food from a metal spoon, her facial expression showing intense enjoyment with eyes widened. A small white lapel microphone is clipped to her shirt. In the background, a modern kitchen with grey walls is visible. Overlaid text identifies the dish as Costco chicken juice rice. (2) A rapid cut shows a close-up of hands using black-handled scissors to cut open the top of a red and black Kirkland Signature rotisserie chicken bag. The woman then appears in a medium shot, making a thumbs-up gesture with her right hand while holding the scissors in her left, standing in a brightly lit kitchen. (3) A fast-paced montage follows, showing the preparation steps directly inside the chicken bag. First, a wooden spoon adds white steamed rice. Next, chopped green scallions are poured from a small glass bowl. Then, shredded rotisserie chicken pieces are placed on top using metal tongs. A spoonful of dark red chili oil is added. Finally, chopsticks are used to vigorously mix the ingredients inside the plastic bag, turning the white rice into a savory brown color. (4) The woman is seen again, now eating the completed mixture. She holds the open bag and takes large mouthfuls using a wooden spoon. There are frequent close-ups of the food, highlighting the texture of the rice and the glistening chicken skin. She nods her head and makes exaggerated expressions of satisfaction. The video concludes with her giving another thumbs-up to the camera while smiling brightly, with variety-style text encouraging viewers to try the recipe.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Costco WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 好市多雞汁飯. [Slogan]: 烤雞最新吃法. (2) [Variety]: 步驟一. [Subtitle]: 加入白飯. (3) [Variety]: 步驟二. [Subtitle]: 撒入蔥. (4) [Variety]: 步驟三. [Subtitle]: 加入雞肉. (5) [Variety]: 步驟四. [Subtitle]: 加一點辣油. (6) [Variety]: 步驟五. [Subtitle]: 攪拌雞肉飯. (7) [Variety]: 就完成囉!. [Subtitle]: 自製雞汁飯. (8) [Variety]: 雞皮🥰. (9) [Slogan]: 做法很簡單喔 大家也來試試看吧!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator demonstrating the recipe and eating.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light blue long-sleeved button-up shirt over a white inner top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern indoor kitchen with grey or neutral-toned walls. Kitchen utensils and a rack are visible in the background, along with a white countertop.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A bright, energetic pop music track with a strong electronic beat and a female vocal begins immediately. The singer's voice is high-pitched and clear. A distinct pop sound effect is synchronized with the visual of the woman taking her first bite. (2) A sharp, percussive click sound effect triggers this phase, followed by the crisp, rhythmic sound of scissors slicing through thick plastic packaging. The upbeat background music maintains a steady tempo of approximately 115 BPM, providing a high-energy acoustic floor. (3) A soft, muffled thud occurs as a large scoop of rice hits the bottom of the plastic bag. This is immediately followed by a subtle, high-frequency rustling sound as chopped scallions are sprinkled over the rice. The music continues without interruption, but the volume is slightly ducked to emphasize these environmental sounds. (4) Two metallic clicks from a pair of tongs mark the start of this phase as shredded chicken is added. This is followed by a faint scraping sound of a metal spoon against a glass bowl as chili oil is drizzled into the mix. The BGM remains dominant, featuring bright synth textures. (5) A continuous, wet squelching and rustling sound begins as chopsticks stir the rice and chicken inside the plastic bag. The acoustic texture is dense and percussive, reflecting the physical motion of mixing. The music's beat strength remains high, driving the pace of the edit. (6) A prominent vocalization from the woman—a long, high-arousal Mmm!—triggers this phase. This is followed by a series of amplified chewing and swallowing sounds, similar to ASMR style, emphasizing the texture of the food. The background music continues its looped sequence with a bright spectral centroid, ending with a final percussive hit.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Step-by-step Process -> Result/Review -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a quick, engaging food hack tutorial demonstrating how to repurpose Costco rotisserie chicken into a flavorful mixed rice dish directly inside the product's packaging. It uses high-energy music, fast-paced visual editing, and sensory audio (ASMR-style chewing) to appeal to viewers looking for convenient and creative cooking ideas.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of Costco and Kirkland Signature logos, along with text specifically naming the store and product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video successfully combines the 'food hack' trend with high-production value short-form editing, utilizing auditory cues and visual step indicators to maintain viewer attention.
